description: Gravity builds Orion, an AI-powered business analyst that monitors business data, performs analysis, and delivers reports and insights. It is positioned for enterprise analytics workflows, including embedded customer-facing analysis and integrations with data sources and workplace tools.
summary: bygravity.com publicly documents one developer-facing integration surface: Orion’s remote MCP server at `https://g.runorion.com/mcp`, authenticated by an Orion account login; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found.
